name: O. Sansuk Muay Thai Gym Pattaya
addressFull: 29 Soi Sukhumvit Pattaya 61/1, Pattaya City, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150

pricing.notes: Figures are published by MuayThaiMap rather than the gym's own current channel; confirm before travelling. No current private-training or accommodation price was found.

classes.schedule: Three published weekday training windows and two Saturday windows; no Sunday training

people.credentials: A current social mirror identifies Kru OT as owner and head coach and describes earlier coaching work in Bali, Baku and Brisbane; these career claims were not independently verified.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Visitors who require on-site accommodation or a fully documented private-training package should confirm those points directly first.

praise: Recent reviewers repeatedly describe the trainers as friendly and welcoming.
Beginners say the instruction is fun, easy to understand and produces quick progress.
Reviewers mention good value for the training received.

comparison.differentiator: A small traditional camp with multiple daily training windows and a documented pipeline of active regional and ONE Friday Fights competitors.

sources.label: Google Maps location listing and reviews
Wanderlog location profile and review aggregation

unverified: people.headTrainer career history beyond social-profile claims
